Label: Section 3.2.3
Issue: Does not specify the minimum hardware requirements for the framework
Correction: The framework shall operate on systems with at least 4GB RAM, 2GHz dual-core processor, and 10GB of available disk space.

Label: Section 3.2.4
Issue: Does not specify how data privacy will be ensured
Correction: The framework shall use encryption (e.g., AES-256) for all data transfers and storage to ensure data privacy.

Label: Section 3.2.6
Issue: Does not specify the type of documentation and training resources
Correction: The framework shall provide a user manual, API documentation, and video tutorials for training purposes.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: Does not specify the minimum hardware requirements for the product environment
Correction: The product shall operate on systems with at least 8GB RAM, 2.5GHz quad-core processor, and 20GB of available disk space.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: Does not specify the minimum hardware requirements for the development environment
Correction: The development environment shall require systems with at least 16GB RAM, 3GHz quad-core processor, and 50GB of available disk space.

Label: Section 6.1
Issue: Does not provide detailed use cases
Correction: The system shall include use cases such as "User logs in", "User runs a test", "User views test results", and "User exports test data".

Label: /F10/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the output file
Correction: The output file shall be in JSON format by default, with an option to export in XML format.

Label: /F20/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the CLI output
Correction: The CLI output shall be in a human-readable format, with an option to export in JSON format.

Label: /F30/
Issue: Does not specify the error message format
Correction: Error messages shall be displayed in a standardized format: "Error [code]: [description]".

Label: /F40/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the exported JSON file
Correction: The exported JSON file shall follow the structure defined in Listing 3.

Label: /F50/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for filtering frequently changed code
Correction: The system shall filter lines of code that have changed more than 5 times in the last 10 commits.

Label: /F60/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for emphasizing often changing tests
Correction: The system shall emphasize tests that have changed results more than 3 times in the last 10 test runs.

Label: /F70/
Issue: Does not specify the format of the .octoignore file
Correction: The .octoignore file shall follow the same format as .gitignore, listing files and directories to be excluded.

Label: /F80/
Issue: Does not specify the supported output formats
Correction: The system shall support output formats including JSON and XML.

Label: /F90/
Issue: Does not specify the structure of the SQLite database
Correction: The SQLite database shall include tables for commits, tests, and results, with appropriate foreign key relationships.

Label: /F100/
Issue: Does not specify the color scheme for highlighting
Correction: The system shall use a color scheme where frequently changed lines are highlighted in orange, and less frequently changed lines in yellow.

Label: /F110/
Issue: Does not specify the structure of the config file
Correction: The config file shall be in JSON format, containing key-value pairs for each setting.

Label: /NF10/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum acceptable response time
Correction: The system shall respond to user commands within 2 seconds under normal operating conditions.

Label: /NF20/
Issue: Does not specify how the program will ensure no changes to the project
Correction: The program shall operate in read-only mode, ensuring no modifications to the project files.

Label: /NF30/
Issue: Does not specify the performance metrics for handling commits
Correction: The system shall process up to 1000 commits within 5 minutes under normal operating conditions.

Label: /NF40/
Issue: Does not specify the user experience requirements for the CLI
Correction: The CLI shall provide auto-completion and context-sensitive help to enhance user experience.

Label: /NF50/
Issue: Does not specify how the system will be made easily extendable
Correction: The system shall provide a plugin architecture allowing developers to add custom commands easily.

Label: /NF60/
Issue: Does not specify the language localization options
Correction: The system shall support English by default, with options for localization to other languages.

Label: /NF70/
Issue: Does not specify the maintenance procedures
Correction: The system shall include a maintenance guide detailing common issues and troubleshooting steps.
